privileged_info_summary: The task is fully generative and synthetic, starting from an empty Webots arena generated via bash script. The expected output file path (/home/ga/Desktop/my_robot.wbt), target robot mass (0.5 kg), and required component names ('left_motor', 'right_motor', 'front_sensor') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and are checked via verifier logic.
